parameters.query: SELECT de.id, de.user_id, de.page_url, de.page_type, de.change_description, de.severity, de.drift_direction, de.detected_at, de.evidence_urls FROM positioning.drift_events de WHERE de.resolved = false AND de.severity = 'high' AND de.detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY de.detected_at DESC;
